'''âv-k-h''' ('''kavakah''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:forecondemn|forecondemn]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-k-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:forecondemn|forecondemn]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âv-k-h
|-
! Lemma
| kavakah
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thivakah|thivakah]] || [[word:jivakah|jivakah]] || [[word:shivakah|shivakah]] || [[word:kivakah|kivakah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuvakah|thuthuvakah]] || [[word:jujuvakah|jujuvakah]] || [[word:shushuvakah|shushuvakah]] || [[word:kukuvakah|kukuvakah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuvakah|thuvakah]] || [[word:juvakah|juvakah]] || [[word:shuvakah|shuvakah]] || [[word:kuvakah|kuvakah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuvakah|thuvakah]] || [[word:juvakah|juvakah]] || [[word:shuvakah|shuvakah]] || [[word:kuvakah|kuvakah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thevakah|thevakah]] || [[word:jevakah|jevakah]] || [[word:shevakah|shevakah]] || [[word:kevakah|kevakah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothovakah|thothovakah]] || [[word:jojovakah|jojovakah]] || [[word:shoshovakah|shoshovakah]] || [[word:kokovakah|kokovakah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thovakah|thovakah]] || [[word:jovakah|jovakah]] || [[word:shovakah|shovakah]] || [[word:kovakah|kovakah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thovakah|thovakah]] || [[word:jovakah|jovakah]] || [[word:shovakah|shovakah]] || [[word:kovakah|kovakah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠvakah|thĂŠvakah]] || [[word:jĂŠvakah|jĂŠvakah]] || [[word:shĂŠvakah|shĂŠvakah]] || [[word:kĂŠvakah|kĂŠvakah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathavakah|thathavakah]] || [[word:jajavakah|jajavakah]] || [[word:shashavakah|shashavakah]] || [[word:kakavakah|kakavakah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thavakah|thavakah]] || [[word:javakah|javakah]] || [[word:shavakah|shavakah]] || [[word:kavakah|kavakah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thavakah|thavakah]] || [[word:javakah|javakah]] || [[word:shavakah|shavakah]] || [[word:kavakah|kavakah]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shavakah|shavakah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshavakah|goshavakah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishavakah|gokishavakah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shavakahnĂŒ|shavakahnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshavakahnknĂŒ|goshavakahnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishavakahnĂŒ|gokishavakahnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shavakahshĂ«|shavakahshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshavakahnkshĂ«|goshavakahnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishavakahshĂ«|gokishavakahshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavakahro|shavakahro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavakahnkro|goshavakahnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavakahro|gokishavakahro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shavakahmu|shavakahmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavakahnkmu|goshavakahnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavakahmu|gokishavakahmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shavakahsher|shavakahsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshavakahnksher|goshavakahnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishavakahsher|gokishavakahsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shavakahng|shavakahng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshavakahnkng|goshavakahnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishavakahng|gokishavakahng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shavakahya|shavakahya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshavakahnkya|goshavakahnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishavakahya|gokishavakahya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shavakahyam|shavakahyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshavakahnkyam|goshavakahnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishavakahyam|gokishavakahyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavakahnĂŒshĂ«|shavakahnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavakahnknĂŒshĂ«|goshavakahnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavakahnĂŒshĂ«|gokishavakahnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavakahnĂŒro|shavakahnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavakahnknĂŒro|goshavakahnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavakahnĂŒro|gokishavakahnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavakahnĂŒmu|shavakahnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavakahnknĂŒmu|goshavakahnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavakahnĂŒmu|gokishavakahnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavakahshĂ«nĂŒ|shavakahshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavakahnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshavakahnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavakahshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishavakahshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavakahshĂ«ro|shavakahshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavakahnkshĂ«ro|goshavakahnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavakahshĂ«ro|gokishavakahshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavakahshĂ«mu|shavakahshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavakahnkshĂ«mu|goshavakahnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavakahshĂ«mu|gokishavakahshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavakahronĂŒ|shavakahronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavakahnkronĂŒ|goshavakahnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavakahronĂŒ|gokishavakahronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavakahroshĂ«|shavakahroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavakahnkroshĂ«|goshavakahnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavakahroshĂ«|gokishavakahroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavakahromu|shavakahromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavakahnkromu|goshavakahnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavakahromu|gokishavakahromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavakahmunĂŒ|shavakahmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavakahnkmunĂŒ|goshavakahnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavakahmunĂŒ|gokishavakahmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavakahmushĂ«|shavakahmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavakahnkmushĂ«|goshavakahnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavakahmushĂ«|gokishavakahmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavakahmuro|shavakahmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavakahnkmuro|goshavakahnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavakahmuro|gokishavakahmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

{{wordpage|c2e237e}}
